name: Province Resources Ltd
description: Province Resources Limited is an Australia-based mineral exploration and development company dedicated to providing sustainable solutions to global demands for environmentally-friendly energy sources. The company is actively involved in the exploration and evaluation of various mineral projects, with a primary focus on its flagship HyEnergy Project. Additionally, the company maintains a portfolio of assets including the Gnama Nickel-Copper Project and the Skane Vanadium Project. Through these initiatives, Province Resources aims to contribute to the transition toward a greener economy by developing critical resources necessary for future energy requirements.
